Our Story

Born from a Love
of the Himalayas

Soul Relatives was born from a deep passion for the mountains and a desire to share their magic with everyone. We believe travel is a conversation between the traveller and the land — not a checklist of sights.

From the prayer flags of Bhutan to the rhododendron forests of Sandakphu, the emerald lakes of Meghalaya to the monasteries of Arunachal — every journey we craft is personalised, immersive, and genuinely affordable.

We specialise in group travel (4 pax+), customised meal plans, hand-picked stays, and expert local guidance across 10+ destinations. We also organise treks and hikes.

DG
Deepa Ghosh
Founder
SG
Sudipto Ghosh
Co-Founder

Tour Packages

Choose Your Adventure

All rates are per person for groups of 4–6 pax minimum. Meal plans are fully customisable. No flights included — land packages only.

2N · 3D
AP Plan
Darjeeling Toy Train & Tea Gardens

Sunrise over Kanchenjunga from Tiger Hill, the iconic UNESCO toy train, and lush tea garden walks in the Queen of the Hills.

  • Tiger Hill sunrise & Batasia Loop
  • Darjeeling Himalayan Railway ride
  • Tea garden tour & tasting
  • Sightseeing & hotel accommodation
Min 4 pax · Meal plan customisable
From₹5,500/pax
Book Now
3N · 4D
AP Plan
East Sikkim — Above the Clouds

Nathula Pass, Tsomgo Lake and the breathtaking roads that weave above a vast sea of clouds at 14,000 ft.

  • Nathula Pass & Tsomgo Lake
  • Gangtok sightseeing
  • Rumtek Monastery visit
  • Hotel accommodation included
Min 4 pax · Meal plan customisable
From₹5,000/pax
Book Now
Most Popular
4N · 5D
MAP Plan
North Sikkim — Land of High Passes

Gurudongmar Lake at 17,800 ft, Zero Point, and the legendary Yumthang Valley of Flowers. North Sikkim is otherworldly.

  • Gurudongmar Lake (17,800 ft)
  • Zero Point & Yumthang Valley
  • Lachung & Lachen village stays
  • Protected area permits arranged
Min 4 pax · MAP Plan (breakfast + dinner)
From₹12,500/pax
Book Now
7N · 8D
CP Plan
Nepal — Temples, Lakes & Himalayas

Kathmandu's ancient Durbar Squares, Bhaktapur, Pokhara lakeside and the majestic Annapurna mountain range.

  • Kathmandu & Bhaktapur Durbar Squares
  • Pashupatinath & Swayambhunath temples
  • Pokhara lakeside & Phewa Lake
  • Hotel + breakfast included (CP plan)
Min 4 pax · No flights included
From₹17,000/pax
Book Now
4N · 5D
CP Plan
Bhutan — Land of Happiness

Tiger's Nest clinging to a sheer 3,000 ft cliff face, Punakha Dzong, and Buddhist culture in its most authentic form.

  • Tiger's Nest Monastery trek
  • Punakha Dzong & suspension bridge
  • Traditional Bhutanese cultural experiences
  • Visa & permit assistance
Min 4 pax · No flights included
From₹26,000/pax
Book Now
5N · 6D
MAP Plan
Kashmir — Heaven on Earth

Dal Lake houseboats, Gulmarg ski meadows, Pahalgam valley and the stunning snow-capped peaks of the Vale of Kashmir.

  • Dal Lake shikara ride & houseboat night
  • Gulmarg gondola & Pahalgam excursions
  • Mughal gardens & Shalimar Bagh
  • Hotel + breakfast & dinner (MAP)
Min 4 pax · MAP Plan (breakfast + dinner)
From₹18,000/pax
Book Now
5N · 6D
EP Plan
Meghalaya — Scotland of the East

Crystal-clear Dawki River, living root bridges, Cherrapunji waterfalls and Mawlynnong — Asia's cleanest village.

  • Dawki crystal river & boating
  • Living root bridges, Cherrapunji
  • Mawlynnong & Nohkalikai Falls
  • Shnongpdeng & elephant caves
Min 4 pax · EP Plan (room only)
From₹17,000/pax
Book Now
6N · 7D
EP Plan
Arunachal Pradesh — The Hidden Frontier

Tawang's grand monastery at 10,000 ft — the largest in India — Sela Pass at 13,700 ft, and the pristine tribal culture of the east.

  • Tawang Monastery (largest in India)
  • Sela Pass & Nuranang waterfall
  • Bomdila, Dirang & Bum La border
  • Protected area permits arranged
Min 4 pax · EP Plan (room only)
From₹19,000/pax
Book Now
2N · 3D
AP Plan
Sandakphu — The Sleeping Buddha

Stand at 11,929 ft and witness Kanchenjunga, Everest, Lhotse and Makalu — the world's four highest peaks in one panorama.

  • Sandakphu summit (11,929 ft)
  • Kanchenjunga sunrise views
  • Tumling & Tonglu village trekking stays
  • All meals & local guide included
Min 6 pax · AP Plan (all meals included)
From₹8,000/pax
Book Now
2N · 3D
AP Plan
Dooars — Wild Bengal Safari

Jaldhapara, Lataguri, Samsing & Jaldhaka — encounter one-horned rhinos, elephants and wild cats in Bengal's tropical forests.

  • Jaldhapara jeep & elephant safari
  • Lataguri forest & Gorumara NP
  • Samsing & Jaldhaka riverside camp
  • All meals & accommodation
Min 6 pax · AP Plan (all meals included)
From₹5,000/pax
Book Now

Journeys That Stay Forever
